texto: I had spent the dayfriendless, lonely and sad,a stranger to myself.After drowning the dayon the sea shore,I walked backto my empty houseon the deserted street.The momentI opened the door,the book on my tableflipped its pagesand said:"Friend,Where were youfor so long?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Gulzar que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “I had spent the dayfriendless, lonely and sad,a stranger to myself.After drowning the dayon the s…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre amizade, books, gulzar, com foco em termino e amizade.
